description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed bungalow surrounded by a neat row of stylized trees, featuring a mix of large glass panels and solid white walls. The structure includes a prominent glass-enclosed sunroom or conservatory, a spacious patio area with outdoor seating, and a blue main entrance door. The property is enclosed by a low fence and landscaped with green lawns, garden beds, and paved walkways. Multiple large windows provide ample natural light, and the roof is flat with several skylights and rooftop installations. The rear of the bungalow features a covered terrace with columns and a driveway or parking area. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, flat-roofed white bungalow with large glass windows, a sunroom, landscaped gardens, and a blue entrance door, surrounded by stylized trees and outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue main entrance, glass sunroom on the left, and a row of trees enclosing the property.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the covered terrace with columns, driveway, and large windows facing the backyard.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the flat roof, extensive glass panels, and the patio area with outdoor seating.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the sunroom, garden beds, and the overall L-shaped layout of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass sunroom
